---
title: mertisreader
---

# mertisreader

This site is the migration target for the repository docs.

The package is moving to plain Python source with Quarto documentation. Tutorial pages live under [Tutorials](tutorials/index.qmd), API pages are generated from docstrings, and the example notebook remains available for hands-on exploration.

## Current Direction

- Package source: `mertisreader/*.py`
- Documentation source: `docs_src/*.qmd`
- Example notebooks: `examples/`
- API docs: `quartodoc`
- Tutorials: `docs_src/tutorials/*.qmd`

See the [API Reference](api.qmd) for the generated documentation entry point.
